action_mappings.release_case_transaction_attribute: release transaction attribute {} from case instance {}

action_mappings_indef.release_profile_candidate: release a profile candidate {} from a case instance {}
action_mappings_indef.bind_profile_source: bind a profile source {} to a case instance {}
action_mappings_indef.unbind_profile_source: unbind a profile source {} from a case instance {}
action_mappings_indef.assign_provisional_reviewer: assign provisional reviewer to a case instance {} using a profile source {}

action_mappings_indef.apply_ruleset_provisional_approval: apply ruleset for provisional approval to a case instance {} using an approval policy {}
action_mappings_indef.link_case_customer_segment: link a case instance {} to a customer segment {}
action_mappings_indef.release_case_customer_segment: release a customer segment {} from a case instance {}

action_mappings_indef.release_case_account_attribute: release an account attribute {} from a case instance {}
action_mappings_indef.link_case_transaction_attribute: link a transaction attribute {} to a case instance {}
action_mappings_indef.release_case_transaction_attribute: release a transaction attribute {} from a case instance {}

action_mappings_indef.release_case_jurisdiction_code: release a jurisdiction code {} from a case instance {}

action_mappings_indef.apply_ruleset_with_sme_and_set_gates: apply a rule set {} to a case instance {} with a transaction attribute {} and a subject matter expert {} and set gates

action_mappings_indef.escalate_with_group_approval: escalate a case instance {} with group approval for a customer segment {}, an account attribute {}, and an escalation group {}
action_mappings_indef.escalate_with_team_and_sme_approval: escalate a case instance {} with team and SME approval for a transaction attribute {}, a jurisdiction code {}, and an escalation team {}

predicate_mappings.case_policy_candidate_marked: {} has been marked as a policy candidate
predicate_mappings.case_senior_review_recorded: the senior review for {} has been recorded
predicate_mappings.senior_reviewer_available: {} is available as a senior reviewer
predicate_mappings.sme_available: {} is available as a subject matter expert
predicate_mappings.jurisdiction_code_available: {} is available as a jurisdiction code

preconditions: I can only register a case instance A if it is not the case that A is registered and it is not the case that A has committed a profile switch
effects: Once I register a case instance A, it is the case that A is registered

select_profile_candidate.description: select a profile candidate B for a case instance A
preconditions: I can only select a profile candidate B for a case instance A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and A is compatible with B
I can only select a profile candidate B for a case instance A if it is not the case that the candidate for A is bound
effects: Once I select a profile candidate B for a case instance A, it is the case that A has the candidate profile B selected and the candidate for A is bound
Once I select a profile candidate B for a case instance A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_profile_candidate.description: release a profile candidate B from a case instance A
preconditions: I can only release a profile candidate B from a case instance A if it is the case that A has the candidate profile B selected
I can only release a profile candidate B from a case instance A if it is not the case that A has case rules applied flag and it is not the case that A has case approval initiated
effects: Once I release a profile candidate B from a case instance A, it is the case that B is available

Once I release a profile candidate B from a case instance A, it is not the case anymore that A has the candidate profile B selected and it is not the case anymore that the candidate for A is bound and it is not the case anymore that a reviewer is assigned to A and it is not the case anymore that A has provisional approval and it is not the case anymore that A has a pending escalation and it is not the case anymore that A has a finalized approval and it is not the case anymore that A requires additional review

bind_profile_source.description: bind a profile source B to a case instance A
preconditions: I can only bind a profile source B to a case instance A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available
effects: Once I bind a profile source B to a case instance A, it is the case that A has profile source B
Once I bind a profile source B to a case instance A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unbind_profile_source.description: unbind a profile source B from a case instance A
preconditions: I can only unbind a profile source B from a case instance A if it is the case that A has profile source B
effects: Once I unbind a profile source B from a case instance A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unbind a profile source B from a case instance A, it is not the case anymore that A has profile source B

assign_provisional_reviewer.description: assign provisional reviewer to a case instance A using a profile source B
preconditions: I can only assign provisional reviewer to a case instance A using a profile source B if it is the case that A is registered and the candidate for A is bound and A has profile source B
I can only assign provisional reviewer to a case instance A using a profile source B if it is not the case that a reviewer is assigned to A
effects: Once I assign provisional reviewer to a case instance A using a profile source B, it is the case that a reviewer is assigned to A

assign_reviewer_with_ticket.description: assign reviewer to a case instance A with an escalation ticket B
preconditions: I can only assign reviewer to a case instance A with an escalation ticket B if it is the case that A is registered and the candidate for A is bound and B is available
I can only assign reviewer to a case instance A with an escalation ticket B if it is not the case that a reviewer is assigned to A
effects: Once I assign reviewer to a case instance A with an escalation ticket B, it is the case that a reviewer is assigned to A and A has a pending escalation
Once I assign reviewer to a case instance A with an escalation ticket B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

record_provisional_approval_by_senior.description: record provisional approval for a case instance A by a senior reviewer C with a profile source B
preconditions: I can only record provisional approval for a case instance A by a senior reviewer C with a profile source B if it is the case that a reviewer is assigned to A and the candidate for A is bound and A has profile source B and C is available as a senior reviewer
I can only record provisional approval for a case instance A by a senior reviewer C with a profile source B if it is not the case that A has provisional approval
effects: Once I record provisional approval for a case instance A by a senior reviewer C with a profile source B, it is the case that A has provisional approval
Once I record provisional approval for a case instance A by a senior reviewer C with a profile source B, it is not the case anymore that A has a pending escalation

apply_ruleset_provisional_approval.description: apply ruleset for provisional approval to a case instance A using an approval policy B
preconditions: I can only apply ruleset for provisional approval to a case instance A using an approval policy B if it is the case that the candidate for A is bound and A has engaged the approval policy B
I can only apply ruleset for provisional approval to a case instance A using an approval policy B if it is not the case that A has provisional approval
effects: Once I apply ruleset for provisional approval to a case instance A using an approval policy B, it is the case that A has provisional approval
Once I apply ruleset for provisional approval to a case instance A using an approval policy B, it is not the case anymore that A has a pending escalation

link_case_customer_segment.description: link a case instance A to a customer segment B
preconditions: I can only link a case instance A to a customer segment B if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I link a case instance A to a customer segment B, it is the case that A has customer segment B
Once I link a case instance A to a customer segment B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_case_customer_segment.description: release a customer segment B from a case instance A
preconditions: I can only release a customer segment B from a case instance A if it is the case that A has customer segment B
effects: Once I release a customer segment B from a case instance A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a customer segment B from a case instance A, it is not the case anymore that A has customer segment B

link_case_account_attribute.description: link an account attribute B to a case instance A
preconditions: I can only link an account attribute B to a case instance A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I link an account attribute B to a case instance A, it is the case that A has account attribute B
Once I link an account attribute B to a case instance A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_case_account_attribute.description: release an account attribute B from a case instance A
preconditions: I can only release an account attribute B from a case instance A if it is the case that A has account attribute B
effects: Once I release an account attribute B from a case instance A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release an account attribute B from a case instance A, it is not the case anymore that A has account attribute B

link_case_transaction_attribute.description: link a transaction attribute B to a case instance A
preconditions: I can only link a transaction attribute B to a case instance A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I link a transaction attribute B to a case instance A, it is the case that A has transaction attribute B
Once I link a transaction attribute B to a case instance A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_case_transaction_attribute.description: release a transaction attribute B from a case instance A
preconditions: I can only release a transaction attribute B from a case instance A if it is the case that A has transaction attribute B
effects: Once I release a transaction attribute B from a case instance A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a transaction attribute B from a case instance A, it is not the case anymore that A has transaction attribute B

link_case_jurisdiction_code.description: link a jurisdiction code B to a case instance A
preconditions: I can only link a jurisdiction code B to a case instance A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available as a jurisdiction code and A is compatible with jurisdiction code B
effects: Once I link a jurisdiction code B to a case instance A, it is the case that A has jurisdiction code B
Once I link a jurisdiction code B to a case instance A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as a jurisdiction code

release_case_jurisdiction_code.description: release a jurisdiction code B from a case instance A
preconditions: I can only release a jurisdiction code B from a case instance A if it is the case that A has jurisdiction code B
effects: Once I release a jurisdiction code B from a case instance A, it is the case that B is available as a jurisdiction code
Once I release a jurisdiction code B from a case instance A, it is not the case anymore that A has jurisdiction code B

apply_ruleset_and_set_gate.description: apply a rule set B to a case instance A with a customer segment C and an account attribute D and set gate
preconditions: I can only apply a rule set B to a case instance A with a customer segment C and an account attribute D and set gate if it is the case that the candidate for A is bound and A has customer segment C and A has account attribute D and B is available and A is compatible with B
I can only apply a rule set B to a case instance A with a customer segment C and an account attribute D and set gate if it is not the case that A has case rules applied flag
effects: Once I apply a rule set B to a case instance A with a customer segment C and an account attribute D and set gate, it is the case that A has rule set B applied and A has case rules applied flag
Once I apply a rule set B to a case instance A with a customer segment C and an account attribute D and set gate, it is not the case anymore that B is available

apply_ruleset_with_sme_and_set_gates.description: apply a rule set B to a case instance A with a transaction attribute C and a subject matter expert D and set gates
preconditions: I can only apply a rule set B to a case instance A with a transaction attribute C and a subject matter expert D and set gates if it is the case that the candidate for A is bound and A has transaction attribute C and D is available as a subject matter expert and B is available and A is compatible with B and A is compatible with D
I can only apply a rule set B to a case instance A with a transaction attribute C and a subject matter expert D and set gates if it is not the case that A has case rules applied flag
effects: Once I apply a rule set B to a case instance A with a transaction attribute C and a subject matter expert D and set gates, it is the case that A has rule set B applied and A has case rules applied flag and A requires additional review and A has a pending escalation

Once I apply a rule set B to a case instance A with a transaction attribute C and a subject matter expert D and set gates, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available as a subject matter expert

clear_additional_review_marker.description: clear additional review marker for a case instance A with a customer segment B and an account attribute C
preconditions: I can only clear additional review marker for a case instance A with a customer segment B and an account attribute C if it is the case that A has case rules applied flag and A requires additional review and A has customer segment B and A has account attribute C
effects: Once I clear additional review marker for a case instance A with a customer segment B and an account attribute C, it is not the case anymore that A requires additional review and it is not the case anymore that A has a pending escalation

escalate_with_group_approval.description: escalate a case instance A with group approval for a customer segment B, an account attribute C, and an escalation group D
preconditions: I can only escalate a case instance A with group approval for a customer segment B, an account attribute C, and an escalation group D if it is the case that A has provisional approval and A has case rules applied flag and A has customer segment B and A has account attribute C and A is handled by escalation handle D

I can only escalate a case instance A with group approval for a customer segment B, an account attribute C, and an escalation group D if it is not the case that A has a pending escalation and it is not the case that A has case approval initiated
effects: Once I escalate a case instance A with group approval for a customer segment B, an account attribute C, and an escalation group D, it is the case that A has case approval initiated

escalate_with_team_and_sme_approval.description: escalate a case instance A with team and SME approval for a transaction attribute B, a jurisdiction code C, and an escalation team D
preconditions: I can only escalate a case instance A with team and SME approval for a transaction attribute B, a jurisdiction code C, and an escalation team D if it is the case that A has provisional approval and A has case rules applied flag and A has transaction attribute B and A has jurisdiction code C and A is handled by escalation handle D

I can only escalate a case instance A with team and SME approval for a transaction attribute B, a jurisdiction code C, and an escalation team D if it is not the case that A has case approval initiated
effects: Once I escalate a case instance A with team and SME approval for a transaction attribute B, a jurisdiction code C, and an escalation team D, it is the case that A has case approval initiated and A has a pending escalation

finalize_multifactor_approval.description: finalize multifactor approval for a case instance A with a customer segment B and an account attribute C
preconditions: I can only finalize multifactor approval for a case instance A with a customer segment B and an account attribute C if it is the case that A has case approval initiated and A has a pending escalation and A has customer segment B and A has account attribute C
effects: Once I finalize multifactor approval for a case instance A with a customer segment B and an account attribute C, it is the case that A has a finalized approval

Once I finalize multifactor approval for a case instance A with a customer segment B and an account attribute C, it is not the case anymore that A has a pending escalation and it is not the case anymore that A has provisional approval and it is not the case anymore that A requires additional review

reinstate_provisional_approval_for_sourc.description: reinstate provisional approval for a case instance A with a profile source B by a senior reviewer C
preconditions: I can only reinstate provisional approval for a case instance A with a profile source B by a senior reviewer C if it is the case that A has a finalized approval and A has case approval initiated and the candidate for A is bound and A has profile source B and C is available as a senior reviewer
I can only reinstate provisional approval for a case instance A with a profile source B by a senior reviewer C if it is not the case that A has provisional approval
effects: Once I reinstate provisional approval for a case instance A with a profile source B by a senior reviewer C, it is the case that A has provisional approval

mark_profile_source_reviewer_required.description: mark a profile source B reviewer required for a case instance A
preconditions: I can only mark a profile source B reviewer required for a case instance A if it is the case that A has case approval initiated and A has provisional approval and A has profile source B
I can only mark a profile source B reviewer required for a case instance A if it is not the case that A has a pending escalation and it is not the case that A has been marked as a policy candidate
effects: Once I mark a profile source B reviewer required for a case instance A, it is the case that A has been marked as a policy candidate

mark_reviewer_requirement_with_ticket.description: mark reviewer requirement for a case instance A with an escalation ticket B
preconditions: I can only mark reviewer requirement for a case instance A with an escalation ticket B if it is the case that A has case approval initiated and A has provisional approval and B is available

I can only mark reviewer requirement for a case instance A with an escalation ticket B if it is not the case that A has a pending escalation and it is not the case that A has been marked as a policy candidate
effects: Once I mark reviewer requirement for a case instance A with an escalation ticket B, it is the case that A has been marked as a policy candidate
Once I mark reviewer requirement for a case instance A with an escalation ticket B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

assign_approval_policy_to_case.description: assign an approval policy B to a case instance A
preconditions: I can only assign an approval policy B to a case instance A if it is the case that A has been marked as a policy candidate and B is unassigned and B is applicable to A
effects: Once I assign an approval policy B to a case instance A, it is the case that A is assigned to approval policy B
Once I assign an approval policy B to a case instance A, it is not the case anymore that B is unassigned

engage_approval_policy.description: engage an approval policy C for a case category b A with a case category a case category a B
preconditions: I can only engage an approval policy C for a case category b A with a case category a case category a B if it is the case that A is registered and A is in category b and A is linked to the policy C and B is assigned to approval policy C
I can only engage an approval policy C for a case category b A with a case category a case category a B if it is not the case that A has engaged the approval policy C
effects: Once I engage an approval policy C for a case category b A with a case category a case category a B, it is the case that A has engaged the approval policy C

record_senior_review.description: record senior review for a case instance A using a profile source B by a senior reviewer C
preconditions: I can only record senior review for a case instance A using a profile source B by a senior reviewer C if it is the case that A is registered and A is in category b and A has provisional approval and A has been marked as a policy candidate and A has profile source B and C is available as a senior reviewer
I can only record senior review for a case instance A using a profile source B by a senior reviewer C if it is not the case that the senior review for A has been recorded
effects: Once I record senior review for a case instance A using a profile source B by a senior reviewer C, it is the case that the senior review for A has been recorded

commit_profile_switch_category_a.description: commit profile switch for a case instance A in category a
preconditions: I can only commit profile switch for a case instance A in category a if it is the case that A is in category a and A is registered and the candidate for A is bound and A has case rules applied flag and A has case approval initiated and A has been marked as a policy candidate and A has provisional approval
I can only commit profile switch for a case instance A in category a if it is not the case that A has committed a profile switch
effects: Once I commit profile switch for a case instance A in category a, it is the case that A has committed a profile switch

commit_profile_switch_with_policy.description: commit profile switch for a case instance A using an approval policy B in category b
preconditions: I can only commit profile switch for a case instance A using an approval policy B in category b if it is the case that A is in category b and A is registered and the candidate for A is bound and A has case rules applied flag and A has case approval initiated and A has been marked as a policy candidate and A has provisional approval and A has engaged the approval policy B
I can only commit profile switch for a case instance A using an approval policy B in category b if it is not the case that A has committed a profile switch
effects: Once I commit profile switch for a case instance A using an approval policy B in category b, it is the case that A has committed a profile switch

commit_profile_switch_with_review.description: commit profile switch for a case instance A with recorded senior review in category b
preconditions: I can only commit profile switch for a case instance A with recorded senior review in category b if it is the case that A is in category b and A is registered and the candidate for A is bound and A has case rules applied flag and A has case approval initiated and A has been marked as a policy candidate and A has provisional approval and the senior review for A has been recorded
I can only commit profile switch for a case instance A with recorded senior review in category b if it is not the case that A has committed a profile switch
effects: Once I commit profile switch for a case instance A with recorded senior review in category b, it is the case that A has committed a profile switch

action_nl_templates.select_profile_candidate: select profile candidate {?profile_candidate} for case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates.release_profile_candidate: release profile candidate {?profile_candidate} from case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates.bind_profile_source: bind profile source {?profile_source} to case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates.unbind_profile_source: unbind profile source {?profile_source} from case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates.assign_provisional_reviewer: assign provisional reviewer to case instance {?case_instance} using profile source {?profile_source}
action_nl_templates.assign_reviewer_with_ticket: assign reviewer to case instance {?case_instance} with escalation ticket {?escalation_ticket}
action_nl_templates.record_provisional_approval_by_senior: record provisional approval for case instance {?case_instance} by senior reviewer {?senior_reviewer} with profile source {?profile_source}
action_nl_templates.apply_ruleset_provisional_approval: apply ruleset for provisional approval to case instance {?case_instance} using approval policy {?approval_policy}
action_nl_templates.link_case_customer_segment: link case instance {?case_instance} to customer segment {?customer_segment}
action_nl_templates.release_case_customer_segment: release customer segment {?customer_segment} from case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates.link_case_account_attribute: link account attribute {?account_attribute} to case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates.release_case_account_attribute: release account attribute {?account_attribute} from case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates.link_case_transaction_attribute: link transaction attribute {?transaction_attribute} to case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates.release_case_transaction_attribute: release transaction attribute {?transaction_attribute} from case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates.link_case_jurisdiction_code: link jurisdiction code {?jurisdiction_code} to case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates.release_case_jurisdiction_code: release jurisdiction code {?jurisdiction_code} from case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates.apply_ruleset_and_set_gate: apply rule set {?rule_set} to case instance {?case_instance} with customer segment {?customer_segment} and account attribute {?account_attribute} and set gate
action_nl_templates.apply_ruleset_with_sme_and_set_gates: apply rule set {?rule_set} to case instance {?case_instance} with transaction attribute {?transaction_attribute} and subject matter expert {?subject_matter_expert} and set gates
action_nl_templates.clear_additional_review_marker: clear additional review marker for case instance {?case_instance} with customer segment {?customer_segment} and account attribute {?account_attribute}
action_nl_templates.escalate_with_group_approval: escalate case instance {?case_instance} with group approval for customer segment {?customer_segment}, account attribute {?account_attribute}, and escalation group {?escalation_group}
action_nl_templates.escalate_with_team_and_sme_approval: escalate case instance {?case_instance} with team and SME approval for transaction attribute {?transaction_attribute}, jurisdiction code {?jurisdiction_code}, and escalation team {?escalation_team}
action_nl_templates.finalize_multifactor_approval: finalize multifactor approval for case instance {?case_instance} with customer segment {?customer_segment} and account attribute {?account_attribute}
action_nl_templates.reinstate_provisional_approval_for_sourc: reinstate provisional approval for case instance {?case_instance} with profile source {?profile_source} by senior reviewer {?senior_reviewer}
action_nl_templates.mark_profile_source_reviewer_required: mark profile source {?profile_source} reviewer required for case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates.mark_reviewer_requirement_with_ticket: mark reviewer requirement for case instance {?case_instance} with escalation ticket {?escalation_ticket}
action_nl_templates.assign_approval_policy_to_case: assign approval policy {?approval_policy} to case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates.engage_approval_policy: engage approval policy {?approval_policy} for case category b {?case_category_b} with case category a {?case_category_a}
action_nl_templates.record_senior_review: record senior review for case instance {?case_instance} using profile source {?profile_source} by senior reviewer {?senior_reviewer}
action_nl_templates.commit_profile_switch_category_a: commit profile switch for case instance {?case_instance} in category a
action_nl_templates.commit_profile_switch_with_policy: commit profile switch for case instance {?case_instance} using approval policy {?approval_policy} in category b
action_nl_templates.commit_profile_switch_with_review: commit profile switch for case instance {?case_instance} with recorded senior review in category b

predicate_nl_templates.case_policy_candidate_marked: {?case_instance} has been marked as a policy candidate
predicate_nl_templates.case_senior_review_recorded: the senior review for {?case_instance} has been recorded
predicate_nl_templates.senior_reviewer_available: {?senior_reviewer} is available as a senior reviewer
predicate_nl_templates.sme_available: {?subject_matter_expert} is available as a subject matter expert
predicate_nl_templates.jurisdiction_code_available: {?jurisdiction_code} is available as a jurisdiction code

action_nl_templates_indef.select_profile_candidate: select a profile candidate {?profile_candidate} for a case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_profile_candidate: release a profile candidate {?profile_candidate} from a case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_profile_source: bind a profile source {?profile_source} to a case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates_indef.unbind_profile_source: unbind a profile source {?profile_source} from a case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_provisional_reviewer: assign provisional reviewer to a case instance {?case_instance} using a profile source {?profile_source}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_reviewer_with_ticket: assign reviewer to a case instance {?case_instance} with an escalation ticket {?escalation_ticket}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_provisional_approval_by_senior: record provisional approval for a case instance {?case_instance} by a senior reviewer {?senior_reviewer} with a profile source {?profile_source}
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_ruleset_provisional_approval: apply ruleset for provisional approval to a case instance {?case_instance} using an approval policy {?approval_policy}
action_nl_templates_indef.link_case_customer_segment: link a case instance {?case_instance} to a customer segment {?customer_segment}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_case_customer_segment: release a customer segment {?customer_segment} from a case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates_indef.link_case_account_attribute: link an account attribute {?account_attribute} to a case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_case_account_attribute: release an account attribute {?account_attribute} from a case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates_indef.link_case_transaction_attribute: link a transaction attribute {?transaction_attribute} to a case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_case_transaction_attribute: release a transaction attribute {?transaction_attribute} from a case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates_indef.link_case_jurisdiction_code: link a jurisdiction code {?jurisdiction_code} to a case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_case_jurisdiction_code: release a jurisdiction code {?jurisdiction_code} from a case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_ruleset_and_set_gate: apply a rule set {?rule_set} to a case instance {?case_instance} with a customer segment {?customer_segment} and an account attribute {?account_attribute} and set gate
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_ruleset_with_sme_and_set_gates: apply a rule set {?rule_set} to a case instance {?case_instance} with a transaction attribute {?transaction_attribute} and a subject matter expert {?subject_matter_expert} and set gates
action_nl_templates_indef.clear_additional_review_marker: clear additional review marker for a case instance {?case_instance} with a customer segment {?customer_segment} and an account attribute {?account_attribute}
action_nl_templates_indef.escalate_with_group_approval: escalate a case instance {?case_instance} with group approval for a customer segment {?customer_segment}, an account attribute {?account_attribute}, and an escalation group {?escalation_group}
action_nl_templates_indef.escalate_with_team_and_sme_approval: escalate a case instance {?case_instance} with team and SME approval for a transaction attribute {?transaction_attribute}, a jurisdiction code {?jurisdiction_code}, and an escalation team {?escalation_team}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_multifactor_approval: finalize multifactor approval for a case instance {?case_instance} with a customer segment {?customer_segment} and an account attribute {?account_attribute}
action_nl_templates_indef.reinstate_provisional_approval_for_sourc: reinstate provisional approval for a case instance {?case_instance} with a profile source {?profile_source} by a senior reviewer {?senior_reviewer}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_profile_source_reviewer_required: mark a profile source {?profile_source} reviewer required for a case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_reviewer_requirement_with_ticket: mark reviewer requirement for a case instance {?case_instance} with an escalation ticket {?escalation_ticket}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_approval_policy_to_case: assign an approval policy {?approval_policy} to a case instance {?case_instance}
action_nl_templates_indef.engage_approval_policy: engage an approval policy {?approval_policy} for a case category b {?case_category_b} with a case category a case category a {?case_category_a}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_senior_review: record senior review for a case instance {?case_instance} using a profile source {?profile_source} by a senior reviewer {?senior_reviewer}
action_nl_templates_indef.commit_profile_switch_category_a: commit profile switch for a case instance {?case_instance} in category a
action_nl_templates_indef.commit_profile_switch_with_policy: commit profile switch for a case instance {?case_instance} using an approval policy {?approval_policy} in category b
action_nl_templates_indef.commit_profile_switch_with_review: commit profile switch for a case instance {?case_instance} with recorded senior review in category b

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a case instance or a profile candidate or a rule set or a account attribute or a customer segment or a transaction attribute or a profile source or a escalation ticket or a approval policy or a senior reviewer or a subject matter expert or a jurisdiction code or a escalation handle is also a object
Everything that is a escalation group or a escalation team is also a escalation handle
Everything that is a case category a or a case category b is also a case instance
